pages.text: One misty morning, Ellie found a glass bottle on the beach. Inside was an old treasure map!
Ellie's heart leaped. She and Abbie jumped aboard their ship and set sail!
CRASH! A huge storm hit their ship. Ellie grabbed the wheel and held on tight!
'Land ahoy!' squawked Polly. There, glowing in the golden sunrise, was a magical island!
Ellie anchored the ship and splashed ashore. She and Abbie laughed as the warm waves tickled their feet!
The jungle glowed with magical light. Curious little creatures with glowing eyes peeked from every leaf!
Deep in the jungle, they found a huge stone temple. Golden symbols glowed on every wall!
A secret door opened with a rumble. Ellie and Abbie gasped — the whole room sparkled with treasure!
'Pirates! Pirates!' squawked Polly. Five silly pirates burst out of the jungle, waving their wobbly old swords!
Ellie held up the map. "The real treasure is over THERE!" The silly pirates believed her and ran — and Abbie chased them all the way to the beach!
Back on the beach at sunset, Ellie slowly opened the treasure chest. Her eyes went wide — it was the most beautiful thing she had ever seen!
That night, Ellie and Abbie sailed home under a million stars. The greatest treasure of all was the adventure they had shared together.
